nodes.context: One of the most powerful Tongs in San Francisco's Chinatown during the early 20th century, involved in organized crime and Tong wars.
A Tong that allied with the Suey Sing Tong against the Bing Kong Tong, instigating a violent Tong war.
A Tong that allied with the Hop Sing Tong against the Bing Kong Tong, instigating a violent Tong war.

edges.context: Allied against the Bing Kong Tong, instigating one of the most violent Tong wars in the United States.
Allied with Suey Sing Tong against Bing Kong Tong in a violent Tong war.
Allied with Hop Sing Tong against Bing Kong Tong in a violent Tong war.
